cedict_en: to transmit/to dispatch/to issue (an official document or credential)
dataset_meanings: to issue (an official document or credential)

must_distinguish.note: 送给 = give as a gift or hand something to someone; 发送 = transmit/send digitally or officially (messages, signals)

cedict_en: disaster-stricken/to be hit by a natural calamity
dataset_meanings: to be hit by a natural calamity

must_distinguish.note: 灾害 = disaster as a noun (objective); 受灾 = be hit by a disaster (formal verb, official/news register); 遭殃 = suffer a calamity (colloquial, more dramatic/personal)

变为 = transform into (formal/written); 变成 = turn into (neutral, result-focused); 变得 = become + adj (only used before adjectives); 变 = to change/shift (bare verb); 成为 = become in the sense of taking on a role/status; 成 = succeed/become (short, often in complements like 变成).

变为 = become/turn into (directional result); 变 = general change/become (simple verb); 改变 = change intentionally (transitive, deliberate); 变化 = change/variation (noun/verb, natural process); 变动 = fluctuation/shift (noun, often institutional or unstable)

变为 = become/turn into (directional result); 变 = general change/become (simple verb); 改变 = change intentionally (transitive, deliberate); 变化 = change/variation (noun/verb, natural process); 变动 = fluctuation/shift (noun, often institutional or unstable)
古 = ancient as attributive morpheme/adj (古城); 古老 = age-old (people/things still existing); 古代 = noun 'ancient times'; 悠久 = long-standing (history/tradition, formal praise)

cedict_en: variant of 勾[gou1]/sentence/clause/phrase/classifier for phrases or lines of verse
dataset_meanings: classifier for phrases or lines of verse

must_distinguish.note: 句 is primarily a measure word/classifier for sentences and set phrases; 句子 is the standalone noun 'sentence'. 句 as a noun is literary/abbreviated.

cedict_en: only; merely; nothing but; no more than/it's just that ...

must_distinguish.note: All restrict scope to 'merely/only': 仅/仅仅 are neutral restrictors; 只不过 and 只是 add a mild dismissive/concessive shade; 无非 = 'nothing but' (slightly emphatic); 不过 doubles as a concessive connector ('however')
叫作 = be called/known as (everyday, informal naming); 称为 = be called/designated (neutral to formal, written); 称 = call or name (also means 'to weigh'; broader literary usage).
可能 = possible/maybe (also adj and noun: 'possibility'); 也许 = maybe (pure adverb, colloquial); 说不定 = maybe/who knows (implies genuine uncertainty, idiomatic)

cedict_en: (bound form) right; right-hand side/(bound form) (politics) right of center/(bound form) (old) west/(literary) the right side as the side of precedence
dataset_meanings: (literary) the right side as the side of precedence

must_distinguish.note: 右 = directional morpheme/adjective (right); 右边 = noun phrase for the right side as a location
右 = directional morpheme/adjective (right); 右边 = noun phrase for the right side as a location
名人 = famous or notable person in any field (history, politics, sport, arts); 明星 = star/celebrity, typically in entertainment (film, music, sport).

cedict_en: erhua form of 名牌[ming2 pai2]

must_distinguish.note: 名牌儿 is the 儿化 colloquial/Beijing spoken variant of 名牌; same meaning but 名牌 is the standard written/formal form used in most contexts.
后面 = neutral spatial 'behind'; 背后 = behind s.o.'s back (literal or figurative scheming); 后头 = colloquial synonym of 后面; 后 = particle/literary 'after; behind'
含 = hold in mouth/contain (physical or abstract, single character). 含有 = contain (specific substance/element, formal). 包含 = contain/include (broader set membership, formal).
内容 (5k) = content as subject matter/substance of a text or topic; 含量 = measurable amount/proportion of a component (e.g. sugar content, nutrient content)

cedict_en: (of a pupil) to write down (in a dictation exercise); dictation/(music) to transcribe by ear
dataset_meanings: (of a pupil) to write down (in a dictation exercise)

must_distinguish.note: Both mean 'to hear'; 听见 = hear (emphasises the sensory event — sound reached you); 听到 = hear (neutral completion — you received the sound)

cedict_en: to breathe/to suck in/to absorb/to inhale

must_distinguish.note: 吸 = inhale/suck in (physical action); 吸收 = absorb/assimilate (physics, nutrients, ideas); 吸取 = draw/extract (lessons, experience); 摄取 = intake/ingest (nutritional/biological).
吸烟 = smoke (formal/written, e.g. no-smoking signs); 抽烟 = smoke (colloquial everyday speech)

味道 = flavor/smell (neutral, most common); 味儿 = colloquial/dialectal variant of 味道; 滋味 = taste plus the feeling/aftertaste (can be figurative); 口味 = one's personal taste preference or a food's flavor profile.
哥 = any elder brother (non-specific); 大哥 = the eldest brother specifically, or respectful address to an older male
唱 = sing (everyday, any context); 演唱 = sing in a formal or stage performance (implies an audience)
商务 = business in a formal/official sense (商务舱, 商务部); 商业 = commerce as an industry or sector; 生意 = everyday running of a trade or shop; 买卖 = the concrete act of buying and selling (transactions).

cedict_en: to like/to love/to be fond of/favorite

must_distinguish.note: 爱 = love/like (broad, deep); 喜爱 = like/be fond of (preference, lighter); 热爱 = love ardently (a cause, career, country); 恋爱 = be romantically in love (relationship state).

cedict_en: to turn round; to turn one's head/later; by and by
dataset_meanings: to turn round; to turn one's head

must_distinguish.note: 转向 = change direction / pivot (vehicle, policy, broad turn); 回头 = turn one's head back / return; also colloquial 'later'; 拐弯 = turn a corner (physical, road/path)

cedict_en: regimental command/head of a delegation/group buy organizer; group-buying coordinator

must_distinguish.note: 国庆节 is the full name of the PRC National Day holiday; 国庆 is the short form used attributively (国庆假期) or in contexts where 节 is understood.
图画 = hand-drawn or painted picture (artwork); 图片 = photo or printed/digital image; 图 = functional visual: diagram, chart, or map

cedict_en: surname Tu/Tu ethnic group/earth/dust/clay/local/indigenous/crude opium/unsophisticated/one of the eight categories of ancient musical instruments 八音[ba1 yin1]
dataset_meanings: one of the eight categories of ancient musical instruments 音

must_distinguish.note: 土 = soil/earth as a material substance; 土地 (5k) = land as property, territory, or arable ground

cedict_en: to be present; to be on the scene

must_distinguish.note: 在场 = be present at an event/scene (often legal/official: witness present); 处在 = be situated in a state or condition (abstract or physical location in a state).
之下 = under/beneath (abstract hierarchy: rule, pressure, conditions); 地下 = underground (physical location, also fig. clandestine)
地形 = terrain/landforms (types of physical features: hills, plains, rivers — descriptive); 地势 = the lie/configuration of the land (how high/low/sloped it sits — positional).
地面 = the ground/floor (physical underfoot surface); 面 = any face or surface (general, also spatial classifier); 平面 = flat plane (geometric/technical term)
坏处 = noun: a downside/drawback; 有害 = adjective: harmful/damaging; 危害 = verb/noun: endanger, pose a threat (systemic); 伤害 = verb: to hurt/injure (person, feelings)

cedict_en: model (particular version of a manufactured article)/type (product specification in terms of color, size etc)
dataset_meanings: model (particular version of a manufactured article)
type (product specification in terms of color, size etc)

must_distinguish.note: 型 = type/model as a bound suffix in compounds; 型号 = the full product model/spec designation (number + type, e.g. iPhone型号)

培训班 = training class (a scheduled course/class); 培训 = vocational training (the process, workplace-oriented); 培养 = nurture/develop over time (people, skills, habits); 训练 = drill/train (repeated practice, sport or military)
基本上 = purely adverbial 'basically; on the whole'; 基本 = 'basic' (adjective) or 'basically' (adverb) — more versatile but less emphatic as adverb

cedict_en: (bound form) to increase; to augment; to add to
dataset_meanings: (bound form) to increase; to augment; to add to

must_distinguish.note: 增 = root morpheme (increase/add); 增多 = grow in number (intransitive, count nouns); 增加 = increase (transitive or intransitive, most neutral); 增长 = grow (often GDP/population, with scale sense); 增添 = add to/enrich (positive connotation); 递增 = increase incrementally/steadily.

增 = root morpheme (increase/add); 增多 = grow in number (intransitive, count nouns); 增加 = increase (transitive or intransitive, most neutral); 增长 = grow (often GDP/population, with scale sense); 增添 = add to/enrich (positive connotation); 递增 = increase incrementally/steadily.
增大 = increase in size or amount (general growth). 放大 = magnify/enlarge (optical or signal amplification). 扩大 = expand/broaden (scope, scale, influence).
声 is a bound morpheme/literary unit (also a measure word for sounds); 声音 is the standalone spoken word for sound or voice in everyday use

cedict_en: to be situated at/to find oneself at

must_distinguish.note: 在场 = be present at an event/scene (often legal/official: witness present); 处在 = be situated in a state or condition (abstract or physical location in a state).
处罚 = penalize (administrative, fines); 惩罚 = punish (moral/disciplinary); 制裁 = sanctions (political/legal, formal register)
夏 is a bare morpheme (mostly in compounds); 夏天 is spoken/everyday 'summer'; 夏季 is written/formal 'summer season' — not interchangeable in register.
夏 is a bare morpheme (mostly in compounds); 夏天 is spoken/everyday 'summer'; 夏季 is written/formal 'summer season' — not interchangeable in register.
All mean 'outside': 外 is a bound morpheme/prefix; 外边 (colloq.) and 外面 (neutral) are interchangeable locatives; 之外 is a formal/written postposition meaning 'apart from/beyond'
外套 = coat/jacket (general outerwear, any material); 羽绒服 = down jacket (specific insulated garment type)
外语 = foreign language (general, spoken or written); 外文 = foreign language in its written/textual form (used for books, documents, written materials).

cedict_en: outside/outer surface/abroad/place other than one's home

must_distinguish.note: All mean 'outside': 外 is a bound morpheme/prefix; 外边 (colloq.) and 外面 (neutral) are interchangeable locatives; 之外 is a formal/written postposition meaning 'apart from/beyond'

cedict_en: outside (also pr. [wai4 mian5] for this sense)/surface/exterior/external appearance
dataset_meanings: outside (also pr. [wài mian] for this sense)

must_distinguish.note: All mean 'outside': 外 is a bound morpheme/prefix; 外边 (colloq.) and 外面 (neutral) are interchangeable locatives; 之外 is a formal/written postposition meaning 'apart from/beyond'

cedict_en: many kinds of; multiple; diverse; multi-
dataset_meanings: many kinds of; multiple; diverse; multi-

must_distinguish.note: 多种 = many kinds/varieties (stresses quantity of types); 各种 = all kinds/every sort (stresses variety covering each type)
夜里 = colloquial spoken 'at night'; 夜间 = formal/written 'nighttime' (used in official/technical contexts); 夜 = literary/classical monosyllable
夜里 = colloquial spoken 'at night'; 夜间 = formal/written 'nighttime' (used in official/technical contexts); 夜 = literary/classical monosyllable
成人 is formal/written (legal, official contexts); 大人 is colloquial/spoken, used esp. when talking to children

cedict_en: Volkswagen (automobile manufacturer)/the masses/the great bulk of the population/popular (of music, science etc)
dataset_meanings: the great bulk of the population

must_distinguish.note: 大众 = the masses / the general public (neutral to formal, used in media/slogans: 大众文化); 老百姓 = ordinary folks / the common people (colloquial, warm, emphasises everyday citizens).
厅 = hall or living room (general); 大厅 = large public lobby/hall (e.g. hotel, station); 客厅 = living room specifically in a home
All describe loudness; 响 = to make sound / be loud (verb/adj, broad); 响亮 = loud and clear (evaluative adj, positive); 大声 = loudly, in a loud voice (manner adverb, neutral).
